failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT
    p.id AS profile_id,
    p.username,
    p.full_name,
    p.num_followers
FROM
    profile p
WHERE
    p.biography_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'women & clothing & (luxury | premium | high-end | designer | fashion)')
ORDER BY
    ts_rank(p.biography_lexemes, to_tsquery('english', 'women & clothing & (luxury | premium | high-end | designer | fashion)')) DESC,
    p.num_followers DESC
LIMIT 10;
